name: Florence Nightingale
description:
FGO | Hospital bound

Alright so I technically haven't finished the American Singularity cause I've been slacking and picked up stay night but from what I've played I really enjoy Nightingale and figured it be fun to make a kinda general bot about her, well this is less general cause It's got a specific scenario but what ever.

Also if this breaks too much lore (which I don't think it should) Let me know

ALSO also I'm leaving it limitless cause I don't know how graphic the burn descriptions will be
